title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a feature by Anthropic that enables users to create website prototypes, landing pages, and presentations through AI-generated designs and code. The tutorial demonstrates the full workflow from prompt input to downloading production-ready code and redesigning existing websites.
